Note: Originally meant to make this for myself, but thought others may have the same issue. Sharing the love and all, yadda yadda yadda. Left the intro pretty open-ended for you to decide who you are/your standing/ etc.

Extra note: Assuming a comment about bot descriptions being copy pasted from the wiki is about you when your bot description isn’t even public, complaining on my page + then editing yours to partially COPY MINE is kind of crazy. Nobody could see your privated bot descriptions. But if the shoe fits, I guess 🤷‍♀️

Please do not start drama with an online stranger over comments that are clearly not about you or your bots. I promise you’re not that important. Thanks.
